title: Verify Cancel Trial with Loss Aversion Exit Gate
description: Test that clicking Cancel triggers the Loss Aversion Exit Gate with warning about losing remaining days
preconditions: User has active trial with 6 days remaining
User is in Trial Corner Manage section

steps.description: 1. Navigate to Trial Corner > Manage Trial
3. Observe Loss Aversion Exit Gate popup

expected_result: Popup displays headline 'Wait! Don't lose your free days', body states 'If you cancel now, you lose access to all premium content immediately. You still have 6 days left', primary action shows 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder', secondary action shows 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access', cancel-clicked event fires
